topic.title: INFO 7375 Branding & AI - 1/31 Jungian Archetypes in Branding- Presentation Links
topic.text:
Hi all,

Below are links to last Saturday's INFO7375 Branding & AI in class presentations.

Introduction to Branding Archetypes

https://www.beautiful.ai/-OazckcWkJna6do9j_xp/1

Find your Archetype

https://www.beautiful.ai/-OajUPPc_F44V0HULEOt/1

Thanks,

Nina & Nik
